### Config Structure

```json
{
  "client_name": "thecreditbrothers",
  "mode": "vertical",
  "silence_removal": {
    "min_silence": 0.5,
    "min_speech": 0.25,
    "padding_ms": 100,
    "merge_gap": 0.3,
    "detect_restarts": true,
    "restart_phrase": "cut cut"
  },
  "audio": {
    "enhance": true,
    "fix_channels": "left"
  },
  "crop": {
    "enabled": true,
    "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
    "width": 1080,
    "height": 1920,
    "face_track": true
  },
  "subtitles": {
    "enabled": true,
    "font": "Montserrat",
    "font_size": 22,
    "bold": true,
    "color": "&HFFFFFF",
    "outline_color": "&H000000",
    "outline_width": 2,
    "alignment": 10,
    "margin_v": 50
  },
  "target_duration": 90,
  "hook": {
    "auto_detect": true,
    "move_to_front": true
  },
  "output": {
    "suffix": "_NRVES",
    "format": "mp4"
  }
}
```


## Pipeline Steps (Full Flow)

```
Input Video
  ↓
[1] Fix Audio Channels (if configured)
  ↓
[2] Silence Removal (Silero VAD)
  ↓
[3] Transcribe (faster-whisper medium)
  ↓
[4a] Creative Analysis → Editorial Cut (Creative Mode)
  -- OR --
[4b] Hook Detection → Hook Reorder (Trust Mode)
  ↓
[5] Crop to 9:16 with Face Tracking
  ↓
[6] Re-Transcribe (Creative Mode only, for accurate SRT)
  ↓
[7] Burn Subtitles (libass)
  ↓
Output: {filename}_NRVES.mp4 + .srt
```
